title: AS 1670.1 — Fire detection, warning, control and intercom systems — System design, installation and commissioning — Fire
summary: Defines design, installation and commissioning requirements for automatic fire detection systems in Australia. Covers detector spacing, zoning, FIP location, ASE, brigade interface and verification testing.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.paraphrase: Defines key terms (FIP, ASE, addressable point, zone).

clauses.title: Detector spacing — smoke
clauses.paraphrase: Maximum spacing for photoelectric / ionisation point detectors based on ceiling height and configuration.

clauses.title: Detector spacing — heat
clauses.paraphrase: Spacing rules for fixed-temperature and rate-of-rise heat detectors.

clauses.title: Zoning
clauses.paraphrase: Maximum zone area, mandatory zone splits (stair, lift, riser, plant), labelling.

clauses.title: FIP siting
clauses.paraphrase: Location of fire indicator panel relative to entry point and brigade access.

clauses.title: Manual call points
clauses.paraphrase: Spacing, mounting height and travel distance for MCPs.

clauses.title: Cable selection
clauses.paraphrase: Approved cable types (WS52W, MIMS) and segregation requirements.

title: AS 1670.4 — Fire detection, warning, control and intercom systems — Sound systems and intercom systems for emergency purposes
summary: Sound system and EWIS / WIP requirements: speaker coverage, intelligibility, intercom warden phones.

clauses.title: Speaker coverage
clauses.paraphrase: STI / coverage targets per occupied space.

clauses.title: WIP siting
clauses.paraphrase: Where warden intercom phones must be located on each floor.

title: AS 1851 — Routine service of fire protection systems and equipment
summary: Routine maintenance, inspection and testing schedule for fire systems including detection, sprinklers, hydrants, doors and ventilation.

clauses.title: Monthly inspection — FIP
clauses.paraphrase: Visual checks, fault list review, battery condition indicators.

clauses.title: Six-monthly tests
clauses.paraphrase: Detector functional sample, MCP test, ASE / brigade signalling test.

clauses.title: Annual battery load test
clauses.paraphrase: Discharge test on FIP standby batteries; voltage drop limits.

clauses.title: Records
clauses.paraphrase: Logbook entries, baseline records, defect register.

title: AS 2118.1 — Automatic fire sprinkler systems — General systems
summary: Design and installation of automatic sprinkler systems for general occupancies.

title: AS 2419.1 — Fire hydrant installations — System design, installation and commissioning
summary: Hydrant system design, pressure / flow performance and commissioning.

title: AS 2444 — Portable fire extinguishers and fire blankets — Selection and location
summary: Selection, classification and placement of portable extinguishers and blankets per fire risk class.

title: AS 3745 — Planning for emergencies in facilities
summary: Emergency planning, EPC structure, ECO appointments, drills, signage and procedures.
